channel.title: Welcome on GD Blog! on GdBlog
channel.description: Recent content in Welcome on GD Blog! on GdBlog

item.title: About me
item.description:
Who am I?

I am a french 15-yo dev on Github and I would be so happy if I could have a nice community of open source devs (that’s why I created this blog btw).

My Github: @GdXcIi

My projects

I don’t have many projects yet, but I already have a few ones:

  • a microkernel in Rust named Space (Github). But before clicking the link, please note that I am in a big big efactor so pls look at the other branches (not main).

item.title: Hello everyone on my blog!
item.description:
Hello everyone!

I just wanted to say hello because this is my first post on this blog!

What will I post on my blog?

I will post about my projects (eg: Space…), some hacks on Linux, about bugs in my projects in my hacks and I feel them, etc…
